stories.title: Historic All-Italian Men's SF — Cobolli def. FAA + Arnaldi def. Berrettini (ret.)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Cobolli def. No. 4 FAA 4-6, 6-4, 6-4, 6-4. Arnaldi def. Berrettini (ret. 5-7, 2-5, hip). The first all-Italian men's Grand Slam semifinal in history is set. Italy is in Sunday's final. #RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Cobolli: 3-0 vs FAA. New No. 10 in the world. First major SF. His reward? An all-Italian clash with Arnaldi (No. 104) on Friday. No. 1 Sabalenka, Sinner, Djokovic, Alcaraz all gone. This Roland Garros has eaten the form book. #RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Cobolli, Arnaldi Set Up First All-Italian Men's Grand Slam Semifinal in History

image_concepts.label: Image

All-Italian SF — Cobolli def. FAA + Arnaldi def. Berrettini

research.facts:
Cobolli def. FAA + Arnaldi def. Berrettini — All-Italian SF
**Confirmed facts:**
- Cobolli def. FAA 4-6, 6-4, 6-4, 6-4 [HIGH — Roland Garros official + ATP Tour]
- Match played Court Philippe-Chatrier, Day 11 (Wednesday June 3) [HIGH — RG official]
- Roof closed at start of second set (blustery conditions in set 1) [HIGH — ATP Tour + multiple]
- Cobolli won all three previous H2H meetings vs FAA [HIGH — ATP Tour official]
- Cobolli's win secured his ATP top-10 debut [HIGH — ATP Tour official]
- Arnaldi def. Berrettini 7-5, 5-2 ret. — Berrettini retired with left hip injury [HIGH — RG official + Tennis Majors]
- Night session, Court Philippe-Chatrier [HIGH — RG schedule]
- First all-Italian men's Grand Slam semifinal in history [HIGH — RG official + ESPN + ATP Tour multiple]
- Italy guaranteed a finalist in Sunday's men's final [HIGH — confirmed by draw]
- Third time two Italians at a major SF after Pietrangeli/Sirola RG 1960 and Sinner/Musetti RG 2025 [HIGH — Yardbarker + ESPN]
- Arnaldi ranked No. 104 in the world [HIGH — Tennis Majors]
- Cobolli ranked No. 10 after win (ATP Live Rankings) [HIGH — ATP Tour]
- Arnaldi the second man to win a RG QF by retirement in the Open Era [MEDIUM — Tennis Majors; single source]
**Source URLs:**
- Roland Garros official: rolandgarros.com/en-us/article/2026-edition-cobolli-auger-aliassime-qf
- ATP Tour: atptour.com/en/news/auger-aliassime-cobolli-roland-garros-2026-wednesday
- Tennis Majors: tennismajors.com/roland-garros-news/berrettini-retires-against-arnaldi...
- ESPN: espn.com/tennis/story/_/id/48959161/italians-cobolli-arnaldi-advance-french-open-semifinals

stories.title: Sabalenka Collapses vs Shnaider — "I Just Want to Quit Tennis Right Now"

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: Sabalenka led 4-1 in the second set. Served for the match at 5-4. Then lost the last 10 games — and the match 3-6, 7-5, 6-0. Post-match: "I just want to quit tennis right now." The No. 1 is out of Roland Garros. #RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #Sabalenka

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Shnaider: No. 25 seed. Beat World No. 1 Sabalenka — winning the final 10 games including a 6-0 third set. Now in a Roland Garros semifinal for the first time. The QF win of the tournament. #RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen #Shnaider

article.headline: Sabalenka Collapses Against Shnaider, Says She Wants to Quit Tennis After Roland Garros Exit

research.facts:
Sabalenka vs Shnaider — "I Want to Quit Tennis"
**Confirmed facts:**
- Shnaider def. Sabalenka 3-6, 7-5, 6-0 [HIGH — RG official headline "Shnaider shocks Sabalenka for semifinal spot"]
- Match duration: 2 hours 12 minutes [HIGH — multiple sources]
- Sabalenka led 4-1 in second set and served for match at 5-4, then lost last 10 games [HIGH — multiple]
- Shnaider broke Sabalenka's serve seven times [HIGH — multiple]
- Sabalenka quote: "No thoughts, no emotions, I just want to quit tennis right now, but we'll see." [HIGH — Sky Sports, Yahoo Sports, Irish Times, UPI — multiple]
- Sabalenka quote: "What doesn't kill us makes us stronger, I guess." [HIGH — UPI]
- Loss ended Sabalenka's streak of 6 consecutive Grand Slam semifinal appearances [HIGH — multiple]
- Shnaider No. 25 seed; maiden Grand Slam semifinal [HIGH — WTA]
- First time Sabalenka was eliminated before a GS SF since [not confirmed which GS]
**Source URLs:**
- RG official: rolandgarros.com/en-us/article/2026-edition-qf-sabalenka-shnaider-
- Sky Sports: skysports.com/tennis/news/...

stories.title: Women's SF Day 12 — Kostyuk vs Andreeva

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Kostyuk vs Andreeva is on Chatrier today. If Kostyuk wins, she's the first Ukrainian woman in a Roland Garros final in the Open Era. She's 16-0 on clay in 2026. She beat Swiatek and Svitolina to get here. #RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen #Kostyuk

stories.title: Women's SF Day 12 — Shnaider vs Chwalinska Left-Handed Final Preview

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Shnaider vs Chwalinska — both left-handed. Both in a major SF for the first time. One of them is going to a Grand Slam final. Whoever wins, this is guaranteed to be a first-time champion's year at Roland Garros. #RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen #WTA

stories.title: Men's SFs Preview — Zverev vs Mensik + All-Italian (Friday June 5)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Men's SFs on Friday: Zverev vs Mensik on Chatrier. Then Arnaldi vs Cobolli — the first all-Italian men's Grand Slam SF in history. One Italian is going to Sunday's final regardless. No favourites survived this draw. #RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen
